docs:
# Shimmer Button
A premium button with a conic shimmer sweep and layered lighting.
## Import
```tsx
import { ShimmerButton } from "@/components/ui/shimmer-button";
```
## Usage
```tsx
"use client";


<ShimmerButton shimmerColor="#ffffff" shimmerDuration="3s" borderRadius="24px">Test Me</ShimmerButton>
```
## Props
- **label** (string) — default: `"Test Me"`: Label
- **shimmerColor** (string) — default: `"#ffffff"`: Shimmer color
- **shimmerDuration** (number) — default: `3`: Duration
- **borderRadius** (number) — default: `24`: Radius
- **label** (string) — default: `"Test Me"`: Label
> Requires `"use client"` in the file that renders this component.
Some Aurora UI components use custom Tailwind animations (animate-shimmer, animate-marquee, animate-aurora, etc.). Merge keyframes from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/tailwind.config.ts into your tailwind.config.
## Install
```bash
npx aurora-ui-cli add shimmer-button
# or with shadcn CLI (after aurora-ui init):
npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/shimmer-button
```
